description: Per-preset aesthetic quality criteria. Use during self-review to verify output matches brand personality. These are reviewer-checkable, not bash-automatable.

should_produce: Weighted entrance animations (>1s duration) with power4/expo easing
Dark background with organic green or earth-toned accent
SVG noise grain overlay for texture
Geometric sans-serif display font (Space Grotesk or similar)
Parallax depth layers on hero section
Smooth-scroll feel with scrub values >1.0
Slow, dramatic reveal animations (>1.5s duration) with expo easing
True black or near-black background with soft violet/gold accent
SVG noise grain overlay
High-contrast serif display font (Playfair Display or similar)
Long stagger values (amount: 0.8+) for cascading reveals
Typography-led hero with large display sizes
should_NOT_produce: Monospace or condensed sans-serif display fonts
Bouncy easing (elastic, back with high overshoot)

should_produce: Snappy entrance animations (<0.6s) with back/elastic easing
Light background with heavy black borders and red accent
ALL-CAPS condensed display font (Bebas Neue or similar)
Monospace body text as design commitment
High contrast, raw visual energy
No noise overlay — clean, stark surfaces
Dreamy, floating animations with sine easing (>1s duration)
Deep indigo/purple-black background with soft indigo accent
SVG noise grain overlay (subtle)
Futuristic wide display font (Syne or similar)
High scrub values (2.0+) for ultra-smooth scroll linking
Ethereal, almost weightless element movement
Gentle entrance animations (1.0-1.4s) with expo.out/sine.out easing
Warm cream/light background with orange or earthy accent
Long stagger values (0.25s+) for unhurried cascading
Soft serif display font (Fraunces or similar) with rounded body font
NO noise overlay — clean, warm surfaces
Rounded corners, soft shadows, approachable spacing
should_NOT_produce: Aggressive parallax or horizontal scroll effects

should_produce: Fast, precise animations (0.3-0.5s) with power2 easing
White/light background with sky blue accent
Tight stagger values (0.06s) for near-simultaneous reveals
Clean geometric sans-serif (Plus Jakarta Sans or similar)
NO noise overlay — clinical cleanliness
Generous whitespace, data-forward layouts
Bouncy entrance animations with elastic/back easing
Light, colorful background with rose/vibrant accent
Playful hover effects (scale 1.05+, slight rotation)
Rounded geometric display font with personality
NO noise overlay — bright, clean energy
Character-level text animations where possible
Elements that feel alive and springy
Typography-IS-the-animation — character-by-character reveals
Near-black background with white-as-accent
SVG noise grain overlay (film grain effect)
Refined serif display font (Instrument Serif or similar)
Dramatic expo.inOut easing on text
Magazine editorial layout — large type, generous leading
Minimal imagery — typography and negative space dominate
